entry.title: IDC W15P7T08DD248 (P00016) awarded to ITT CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: ANY AGENCY CAN PLACE AN ORDER AS LONG AS THEY GO THRU SAMD AND HAVE AN IMPLEMENTED LOA

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION P00016 IS TO INCORPORATE THE ADDITIONAL KUWAIT MANDATORY REQUIREMENT CLAUSES FROM THE THE THEATER BUSINESS CLEARANCE (TBC)REQUEST INTO THE W15P7T-08-D-D248 WITHIN CONTRACT CLAUSES WITHIN SECTION (H) SPECIAL CONTRACT REQUIREMENTS AND SECTION (I) CONTRACT CLAUSES OF THE CONTRACT.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RADIO AND TELEVISION BROADCASTING AND WIRELESS COMMUNICATIONS EQUIPMENT MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
